task_completion.visual_evidence: The Weasis application window is visible on the screen.

task_completion.description: A medical image is displayed in the Weasis viewer
task_completion.visual_evidence: A grayscale medical scan (X-Ray/CT) is visible in the main viewing area of Weasis.

task_completion.description: The three-point angle measurement graphic is drawn on the image
task_completion.visual_evidence: Two intersecting lines forming an angle are overlaid on the medical image in the viewer.

task_completion.description: The measured angle value is displayed on the image overlay
task_completion.visual_evidence: A numeric value in degrees (between 1.0 and 179.0) is visible next to the angle measurement graphic in Weasis.

task_completion.description: The screenshot of the measurement is saved to the correct path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file named 'angle_measurement.png' is visible in a file manager at '/home/ga/DICOM/exports/' or is shown open in an image viewer.

task_completion.description: The text report is created with the correct format and measured value
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal shows the contents of 'angle_report.txt' containing 'Angle: <value>', 'Unit: degrees', and 'Location: CT slice structure alignment'. The <value> must match the angle shown in the Weasis measurement.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Weasis application to perform the measurement
integrity.visual_evidence: The measurement overlay and UI elements belong to the genuine Weasis GUI, rather than a mocked-up image or a different application.

integrity.description: The angle value in the text report matches the actual measurement taken in Weasis
integrity.visual_evidence: The numeric value in 'angle_report.txt' is identical to the numeric value displayed on the Weasis measurement overlay, proving it was not fabricated.

integrity.description: The screenshot saved is an actual capture of the Weasis viewer
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'angle_measurement.png' file reflects the exact state of the Weasis viewer at the time the measurement was taken, including the image and the angle overlay.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected screenshot path is /home/ga/DICOM/exports/angle_measurement.png. The expected report path is /home/ga/DICOM/exports/angle_report.txt. The measured angle must be strictly between 1.0 and 179.0 degrees. The provided medical image is an X-Ray Angiography scan.
